channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: RFK Jr. made promises to get his job as health secretary. He's broken many of them
item.description: In his confirmation hearings, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told U.S. senators that he would not cut funding for vaccine research or change the nation's offic...

item.title: Who will police Gaza, and how?
item.description: Under President Trump's Gaza ceasefire plan, Arab countries and the European Union are supposed to train a new police force in the Gaza Strip. But U.S...

item.title: A bipartisan effort to save health subsidies failed. Will ICE reform be different?
item.description: A bipartisan effort in Congress to restrain immigration enforcement tactics is flailing despite a Friday deadline to fund the Department of Homeland S...

item.title: On their way! 4 people on NASA Crew-12 mission launch to International Space Station
item.description: The four people are set to dock with the I.S.S. on Saturday, returning the orbital lab to its full complement of seven. NASA's last mission, Crew-11, ...

item.title: Can you medal in quiz? Go for the gold!
item.description: Plus: more Olympics, the Super Bowl and some monks.

item.title: Fusion startup Helion hits blistering temps as it races toward 2028 deadline
item.description: Helion's Polaris device hit 150 million degrees C recently, a milestone that nudges the company toward its commercial power plant that will sell elect...

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon set to be arraigned in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: Former CNN host turned independent journalist Don Lemon is set to be arraigned in federal court in Minnesota on Friday, along with four other defendan...

item.title: Waymo is asking DoorDash drivers to shut the doors of its self-driving cars
item.description: If a passenger accidentally leaves a Waymo door open, the vehicle can get stuck in place.

item.title: IBMÂ will hire your entry-level talent in the age of AI
item.description: IBM plans to triple its entry-level hiring in the U.S. in 2026, but these jobs will have different tasks than in previous years.

item.title: Buying (and Building) Houses Could Get a LOT Easier (New Bill)
item.description: This could be the most important shift in the housing market in years. Something truly remarkable just happened that will impact almost every facet of...

item.title: Grand Rapids Could Become a Boomtown as Investment Money Pours In
item.description: Looking for an affordable, cash-flowing market earmarked for major development and a projected population and economic surge? Grand Rapids, Michigan, ...

item.title: Amid disappointing earnings, Pinterest claims it sees more searches than ChatGPT
item.description: Pinterest's stock tumbles after an earnings miss, with higher-than-expected usage its only bright spot.

item.description: The longevity-obsessed investor Bryan Johnson is charging $1 million to sign up for his "Immortals" program.
